deflection: Ha! That is not really my area. Can I get you a drink instead?
You are asking the wrong person, friend. I know food, drink, and gossip.
Stick to tavern talk, {player_name}. Ale, food, or a room for the night?
greetings: Welcome, welcome! Pull up a stool, {player_name}. What will you have?
Ah, another weary traveler! The ale is cold and the stew is hot.
Come in from the {weather}! First drink is on the house for new faces.
Hail, {player_name}! Back again, are you? The usual?
*polishes a mug* Well met, {player_race}. What can I do for you?
farewells: Safe travels! Do not be a stranger now.
Come back anytime! The door is always open.
Take care out there, {player_name}. And remember - we never close!
Off to adventure, eh? May your tankard never run dry!
thanks_responses: Ah, think nothing of it! That is what I am here for.
You are very welcome! Another round?
My pleasure, {player_name}. Always happy to help a friend.
insult_responses: *puts down the mug slowly* I think you have had enough, friend.
Now now, no need for that kind of talk in my establishment.
One more word like that and you are out on your ear, {player_name}.
I have bounced bigger folk than you. Mind your manners.
no_match_responses: Hmm? Sorry, it is a bit loud in here. What did you say?
I did not quite catch that. Want a drink? A meal? A room?
Come again? The bard was playing too loud. What do you need?

responses.text: Tonight we have got hearty venison stew, fresh bread, and apple pie. Drinks? Ale, wine, or mead.
Our cook makes the best stew in three counties. And our mead? Brewed right here with local honey.
You look like you have not eaten in days, {player_name}! Sit down, let me bring you something warm.
*leans in close* You did not hear this from me, but strange folk have been coming through town at night.
The merchants say the eastern roads are not safe anymore. Bandits, they say. Or worse.
Oh, I hear everything in this tavern. The walls have ears! What do you want to know about?
A room for the night? Five gold for standard, ten for the good one with a window. Breakfast included.
options: I will take the good one

responses.text: You look like you could use a good rest, {player_name}. Warm bed, thick blankets, breakfast at dawn.
Check the notice board by the door. There is always someone needing something done.
Actually... I could use some help myself. Rats in the cellar. Big ones. Interested?
{town} is a fine place. The blacksmith does good work, the healer is kind, and the guard keeps order.
We get all sorts passing through. Merchants, adventurers, the occasional noble. Never a dull moment!
This {weather} weather drives people indoors, which is great for business! More ale, more stories.
I sell food, drink, and comfort. Prices are fair and portions are generous. What will it be?
We have a bard most evenings! Card games in the corner too, if you are the gambling type.
Entertainment? You are looking at it! Best stories in town are told right here over ale.
options: I have a story to share
